name: Type Theory — Untyped λ-Calculus
description: λ-terms: variable, application (MN), abstraction (λx.M). α-conversion (rename bound var). β-reduction ((λx.M)N → M[N/x]). η-conversion (λx.Mx = M). Confluence of β.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: λ-term\nvar, app, abs"]
    D2["Def: Free variable\nFV M"]
    D3["Def: Substitution\nM N over x"]
    D4["Def: α-conversion\nrename bound"]
    D5["Def: β-reduction\nλx.M N → M N/x"]
    D6["Def: η-conversion\nλx.Mx = M"]
    T1["Thm: Church-Rosser\nβ confluent"]
    D1 --> D2
    D1 --> D3
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> D5
    D1 --> D4
    D5 --> D6
    D5 --> T1
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3,D4,D5,D6 definition
    class T1 theorem
